prog.name: pwog
prog.desc: Jere mesaj ki pwograme pou voye plizyГЁ fwa.
prog.usage_msg:
*Pwograme voye mesaj*
{sep}
1пёҸвғЈ *KREYE YON TACH*
рҹ”№ *Prive*:
  `{prefixe}prog pm num=xxx`
  `date="..." msg="..."`

рҹ”№ *Gwoup*:
  `{prefixe}prog gc jid=xxx`
  `date="..." msg="..."`

2пёҸвғЈ *JERE YO*
в—Ҫ *Lis*: `{prefixe}prog list`
в—Ҫ *Efase*: `{prefixe}prog supp [ID]`
в—Ҫ *Netwaye*: `{prefixe}prog clear`
{inter}
рҹ”Ғ *REPETISYON*:
once, daily, monthly, yearly
prog.supp_not_found: вқҢ ERГҲ\nPa gen tach ak ID sa a: {id}
prog.invalid_num: рҹ“ұ Nimewo telefГІn nan pa bon. Eg: num=509xxxxxxx
prog.invalid_jid: вқҢ JID gwoup la pa bon (li dwe fini ak @g.us)
prog.not_in_group: вқҢ M pa nan gwoup sa a.
prog.future_date: вҸі Dat la dwe nan lavni!
